name: Singapore
key_planning_challenge: A compact island city-state must balance port, airport, housing, water resilience, and high-quality green networks.
expansion_constraint: Island boundary, reclaimed coast, water catchments, strategic port and airport land

historical_snapshots.key_event: Post-war port city faces housing and sanitation pressure
HDB new towns and industrial estates scale rapidly
Marina Bay and water resilience projects expand
Long-term land use plan balances density and liveability
